title: paeonia officinalis var. triternata
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. triternata, commonly known as the White Peony, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Paeoniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. triternata include relieving menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to balance the body's energy and promote overall well-being.
